name: Vegetable Soup (Su Tsai Tang)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch tomato for half a minute and remove the skin.
2. Remove seeds from the tomato and cut into small pieces.
3. In boiling chicken stock, add shredded cabbage, julienne carrot, thinly sliced onion, and julienne celery. Bring to boil again, then reduce heat and cook until tender.
4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Sauté the tomato pieces for 3-4 minutes. Add the sautéed tomatoes, salt, white pepper, MSG (if used), sesame oil, and Tabasco (if used) into the soup. Cook for another 3-4 minutes.
